notification_templates.name: Application Approved by Reviewer
notification_templates.subject: Your Application Has Been Approved: {{application_title}}
notification_templates.title: Application Approved
notification_templates.body:
Dear {{applicant_name}},

Congratulations! Your application has been approved.

Application Title: {{application_title}}
Status: Approved

Thank you for your submission.

Best regards,
The System

notification_templates.name: Application Pending Review

notification_templates.title: Application Pending Review

notification_templates.name: Application Rejected
notification_templates.subject: Application Status Update: {{application_title}}
notification_templates.title: Application Rejected
notification_templates.body:
Dear {{applicant_name}},

We regret to inform you that your application has been rejected.

Application Title: {{application_title}}
Reason: {{rejection_reason}}

If you have any questions, please contact support.

Best regards,
The System
